description_long: This is a modern two-story bungalow with a flat roof and a pink-and-white color scheme. The front facade features a prominent garage, a balcony with railings, and large sliding glass doors leading to the main entrance. The structure includes a rooftop garden or courtyard visible from above, adding greenery to the urban design. Windows are arranged asymmetrically, with some grouped and others spaced apart, providing a contemporary aesthetic. The exterior walls are primarily smooth concrete or stucco, complemented by glass and metal railings. A palm tree and landscaped elements are present near the entrance, enhancing the residential appeal.
description: A modern two-story bungalow with a flat roof, pink-and-white exterior, rooftop garden, and asymmetrical window arrangement. Features include a garage, balcony, and landscaped entry with a palm tree.
description_view_0: Front view showing the garage, main entrance, balcony, and palm tree landscaping.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the flat roof, rooftop garden, and minimal window openings.
description_view_2: Rear view with a large window section and balcony, less landscaping visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing grouped windows, rooftop garden, and additional palm tree.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped and spaced windows
